title: Complete HTML & CSS Mastery
short_description: Build stunning websites from scratch with modern HTML5 and CSS3 techniques.
full_description: Master the fundamentals of web development starting with HTML5 semantic structure and CSS3 styling. This course covers flexbox, grid, animations, responsive design, and best practices for writing clean, maintainable code. By the end, you'll be able to build fully responsive, production-ready websites from scratch.

title: JavaScript: Zero to Expert
short_description: Deep dive into modern JavaScript — ES6+, async/await, and the DOM.
full_description: This comprehensive JavaScript course takes you from the very basics to advanced concepts including closures, prototypes, async programming, the event loop, and modern ES2024 features. You'll build real-world projects like a weather app, a task manager, and a REST API client along the way.

title: React & Next.js: Full Stack Development
short_description: Build powerful full-stack apps with React 18, Next.js App Router, and more.
full_description: Learn React from the ground up — hooks, context, state management — then level up with Next.js App Router, server components, server actions, and API routes. This course also covers authentication with NextAuth.js, database integration with Prisma, and deploying to Vercel. Perfect for developers ready to go full-stack.

title: Node.js & Express: Backend Mastery
short_description: Create scalable REST APIs and backend services with Node.js and Express.
full_description: Dive deep into server-side JavaScript with Node.js. This course covers building RESTful APIs with Express, middleware, authentication with JWT, file uploads, rate limiting, error handling, and connecting to MongoDB with Mongoose. You'll finish with a fully deployed backend project on Railway.

title: Tailwind CSS: Rapid UI Development
short_description: Design beautiful, responsive UIs at lightning speed with Tailwind CSS.
full_description: Stop writing custom CSS from scratch. This course teaches you how to use Tailwind CSS utility classes to rapidly build modern, responsive interfaces. Topics include custom themes, dark mode, component patterns, and integrating Tailwind with React and Next.js projects. Includes a full dashboard UI project.

title: TypeScript for JavaScript Developers
short_description: Add type safety to your JS projects and write more reliable code.
full_description: This course is designed for JavaScript developers who want to adopt TypeScript in their projects. You'll learn types, interfaces, generics, enums, utility types, and how to integrate TypeScript with React, Next.js, and Node.js. Includes real-world refactoring exercises to solidify your understanding.

title: MongoDB & Mongoose: Database Design
short_description: Master NoSQL database design and querying with MongoDB and Mongoose.
full_description: Learn how to design efficient NoSQL databases with MongoDB. This course covers CRUD operations, aggregation pipelines, indexing, schema design with Mongoose, data validation, and connecting your database to a Node.js backend. Ideal for developers building modern web applications.

title: Git & GitHub: Version Control for Developers
short_description: Master Git workflows, branching strategies, and team collaboration on GitHub.
full_description: Every developer needs to know Git. This course covers everything from basic commits and branching to advanced topics like rebasing, cherry-picking, resolving conflicts, and GitHub Actions for CI/CD. You'll also learn pull request workflows, code reviews, and open source contribution best practices.
